scripts.build:orbitos-core: npm run build -w @orbitos/core-types && npm run build -w @orbitos/object-store && npm run build -w @orbitos/activity-log && npm run build -w @orbitos/capabilities && npm run build -w @orbitos/storage-sqlite && npm run build -w @orbitos/runtime && npm run build -w @orbitos/sync-engine && npm run build -w @orbitos/continuity
scripts.test:orbitos-core: npm run test -w @orbitos/object-store && npm run test -w @orbitos/activity-log && npm run test -w @orbitos/capabilities && npm run test -w @orbitos/storage-sqlite && npm run test -w @orbitos/runtime && npm run test -w @orbitos/sync-engine && npm run test -w @orbitos/continuity
